title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
